channel.title: Business English with Marta
channel.description: Recent content on Business English with Marta

item.title: Lessons
item.description:
Business English Lessons

I offer 1-on-1 Business English lessons designed to help professionals communicate more clearly and confidently at work.

My students are usually working in fields such as IT, healthcare, engineering, and other industries where English is needed for meetings, emails, and daily communication.

How the lessons work

Each lesson is 45 minutes and fully personalized.

We usually follow the Business Result textbook, which is designed for real workplace English. This helps us build clear structure and steady progress over time.

In the first lesson, we may focus more on speaking naturally and understanding your current level before moving deeper into the textbook.

What happens during a lesson

During the lesson, you will:

  • Speak and answer questions in English
  • Learn useful business vocabulary and phrases
  • Practice real workplace situations (meetings, emails, discussions)
  • Receive corrections from me during and after speaking
  • Get feedback on how to improve your English

I don’t interrupt every mistake immediately. Instead, I take notes and give clear corrections so you can speak more freely during the lesson.

After each lesson, you will receive updates in your personal spreadsheet with useful corrections, including words and phrases from the lesson. This is the same document each time, so your vocabulary list builds over time.

Your learning materials

We use the Business Result textbook series to guide your progress from your current level to advanced business communication.

Next steps

You can contact me or visit the pricing page for more details.

item.title: Payment Information
item.description:
💳 Business Class Pricing (45 minutes per class)

Package Total Cost Price per Class Savings
1 Lesson $38 $38 —
10 Lessons $350 $35 Save 8%

💡 Note: A 2.9% Stripe processing fee will be added for card payments.

What’s included in Business English:

  • “Business Result” textbooks (Structured Lessons)
  • Professional vocabulary
  • Workplace scenarios

“Looking for something more flexible?” → General English

📅 Payment Deadline

Please make your payment before the lesson begins. I will send you an email with this link, but if you lose the email, here are the Stripe links:

Pay for 1 Lesson – $38 Pay for 10 Lessons – $350

💰 Accepted Payment Methods

You may pay using any of the following:

  • Zelle (U.S. bank transfer)
  • Venmo
  • Visa / Mastercard / American Express (via Stripe)
  • WeChat Pay
  • Alipay

🔁 Cancellation & Rescheduling

You may cancel or reschedule a class for a full refund if you send an email at least 24 hours before your scheduled class time.

Contact Info

item.title: About me
item.description:
Hello! I’m Marta, an experienced ESL instructor dedicated to helping adult learners achieve confidence and fluency in English.

Credentials & Experience

  • B.A. in English (4.0 GPA)
  • TESL Certificate, Oxford Seminars
  • 2,400+ ESL students taught (as of May 2026)

My Language Journey

I was born in Ukraine and moved to the United States at age 10. Because of my experiences in the U.S., I decided to become an English teacher. I encountered many challenges, but that experience will help me relate to you and guide you in your English language experience.

Now, I’m studying my 5th language, Japanese, and after I’m conversational, I’ll start learning my 6th language.

Who I Help

This program is ideal for adult learners, especially Ukrainian, Russian, and Chinese speakers who want to improve their Business English through a structured, textbook-based approach, including:

  • Professional communication skills
  • Business vocabulary and terminology
  • Speaking and listening in workplace contexts
  • Email writing and formal correspondence
  • Presentation and meeting skills

Teaching Style

  • Customized Lessons tailored to your goals (e.g., living in the U.S., travel, test prep)
  • Real‑Time Feedback:
    • Live corrections as you speak
    • Use of phonetic symbols (for clear pronunciation guidance) /ˈsɪmb(ə)ls/

Teaching Materials

  • “Business Result” textbooks
  • Spreadsheet with your words and phrases
  • Website recommendations

Student Feedback

“It was a really instructive class, Marta is a very well-prepared professional that helped me a lot with my English. I expect to book a new class with her and continue to improve my conversational skills. I enjoyed the meeting, thanks a lot Marta!”
— Former student, Gustavo

Ready to Get Started?

You can contact me or visit the pricing page for more details.

item.title: Contact Me
item.description:
I’d love to hear from you!

When you contact me, please include a few details when you reach out:

  • What is your job role or industry?
  • What is your current English level? (beginner / intermediate / upper intermediate / advanced)
  • What is your main goal for improving your Business English?

Email: martazesol@gmail.com
Messaging apps | WeChat: marta_eng or Telegram: @eng_marta

I reply within 24 hours.
